message:
fix(e2e): fix cookie domain and TypeScript issues

Fresh eyes review fixes:
- Remove unused imports (fillInput, assertTextContent)
- Add getCookieDomain() helper for dynamic cookie domain based on BASE_URL
- Fix TypeScript types for helper function parameters
- Make badge count locator more specific to avoid false matches
- Apply same cookie domain fix to session-lifecycle.spec.ts

All 42 E2E tests pass (22 form-validation + 20 session-lifecycle).
